recalls.Description:
RH is recalling several models of its Byron furniture, including dining tables and desks made from travertine and marble. The Byron Reeded Stone tables come in three types of stone—Italian Classico Travertine, Brown Emperador Marble, and Spanish Nero Marquina Marble—and are available in lengths ranging from 72 to 120 inches. The Byron Emperador tables feature a gold Emperador marble top with various wood leg finishes and lengths from 72 to 108 inches. Each item has a specific SKU number located on the underside of the furniture or on the order receipt.

The recall is due to a potential collapse risk when a gap develops between the leg and tabletop under horizontal pressure, which could lead to injury. Consumers are urged to stop using these products immediately and reach out to RH for a full refund and free pickup of the recalled items.
recalls.Title: RH Issues Recall for Byron Tables and Desks Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact RH at 833-359-5394 from 6 a.m. to 7 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, and 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekends. You can also email recall@rh.com or visit https://rh.com/us/en/customer-experience/safety-recalls for more information.

Products.Name: Byron Emperador Dining Tables
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 750 (In addition, about 10 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled RH Byron Reeded Stone Dining Table in Italian Classico Travertine
Recalled RH Byron Reeded Stone Desk in Brown Emperador Marble
Recalled RH Byron Emperador Dining Table in Natural Oak/Gold Emperador Marble

Injuries.Name: RH has received one report of a dining table collapsing, resulting in lacerations.

Retailers.Name: Available at RH galleries, outlets, and online at RH.com from November 2023 through July 2025, priced between $1,700 and $12,000.

Importers.Name: RH US, LLC, of Corte Madera, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of collapse due to gap between leg and tabletop

Remedies.Name: Full refund and free pickup of recalled items

recalls.metaDescription: RH recalls Byron tables and desks due to injury risk. Stop using and contact RH for a full refund and pickup.

recalls.Description: TJX has announced a recall of foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs that were sold in three- or five-piece sets. These sets, which may feature the Nautica or House & Garden branding, include a small wooden table and two to four foldable chairs. The chairs are constructed with wood frames and feature rope on the seat and back, available in various colors including gray, turquoise, brown, sand, black, aqua, pink, green, taupe, and white, supported by a gold bar at the back legs. Some chairs were also sold individually in stores and online as part of handcrafted sets from Vietnam or as HD Furniture Group indoor-outdoor bistro sets.
recalls.Title: TJX Issues Recall for Foldable Wood and Rope Bistro Set Chairs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more details, consumers can reach TJX at 888-520-0157 from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or visit https://www.recallrtr.com/woodandropechair. Additionally, customers can check product recalls on the following retailer websites: HomeGoods at https://m.homegoods.com/us/m/jump/topic/product-recalls/2400019, Marshalls at https://m.marshalls.com/us/m/jump/topic/Product-Recalls/2400019, T.J. Maxx at https://m.tjmaxx.tjx.com/m/jump/topic/product-recalls/2400019, Homesense at https://us.homesense.com/recalls, and Sierra at https://www.sierra.com/lp2/product_recalls/.

Products.Name: Foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs

Images.Caption: Recalled TJX Foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs
Recalled TJX Foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs (blue)
Recalled TJX Foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs (gray)
Recalled TJX Foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs (sand)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received eight reports of the wooden frame of the chair breaking or collapsing when a consumer was seated in the chair, resulting in six reports of minor injuries, including bruising and an ankle strain.

Retailers.Name: Available at Marshalls, T.J. Maxx, HomeGoods, Homesense, and Sierra stores nationwide, as well as online at Homegoods.com, TJmaxx.tjx.com, Marshalls.com, and Sierra.com from March 2020 through September 2023, priced between $130 and $350 for sets and $40 to $80 for individual chairs.

Importers.Name: The TJX Companies Inc., of Framingham, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Risk of chair collapse or breakage while seated, leading to potential falls.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled chairs immediately and contact TJX for full refund instructions. Alternatively, chairs can be returned to any HomeGoods, Marshalls, T.J. Maxx, Homesense, or Sierra store for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: TJX recalls foldable wood and rope bistro set chairs due to a fall hazard. Learn how to get a refund.
